message:
feat: expand conformance coverage from 60 to 213/223 extensions (95.5%)

- Add 18 missing extension test entries across all tiers
- Fix 33+ manifest expectations in VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json
- Add virtual module stubs (openai, adm-zip, linkedom, p-limit, unpdf, @sourcegraph/scip-typescript)
- Expand crypto shim (pbkdf2Sync, createCipheriv/Decipheriv, scrypt, key generation)
- Add allowed_read_roots sandbox mechanism for extension asset reads
- Fix pass_rate calculation: pass/total instead of pass/(pass+fail)
- Include concurrent agent changes (eq_ignore_ascii_case refactor in extensions.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
